paper.title: Hypervelocity stars in the Gaia era: Runaway B stars beyond the velocity limit of classical ejection mechanisms

review.summary: Quick scan: reassessment of 15 previously known high-velocity stars (11 HVS candidates + 4 RV outliers) using Gaia DR2 proper motions and revised spectrophotometric distances. Some stars confirmed unbound; many identified as disk runaway stars. Table 1 provides kinematic input data; appendices provide full kinematic parameters under 3 MW mass models.
